channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Collection of waste not timely causing unsightly litter, 6th March
item.description:
The recycling waste bin for cardboard and plastic was not openable. Boxes were being left on toland around. Please could council empty it and clear the excess flowing around at the earliest? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post 208F8 on the path between Whitehall recreation ground and Southborough Lane, 6th March
item.description:
Not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustine's Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16, 6th March
item.description:
Linthorpe Road Hackney N16 needs cleaning from top to bottom, pavements and around trees bases.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Paint tins and black sacks dumped, 6th March
item.description:
As title and black sacks ripped so waste spilling out. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood

Fly tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th March
item.description:
This seems to be happening on a more regular basis people from the flats are taking their rubbish and dumping it there. I have to look at my window and look at that every day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 312, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 6th March
item.description:
Resident has called to report a dead fox which has been bagged and left at the boundary of 71a to be collected. Please can this be arranged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71A, Malmains Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 6th March
item.description:
This car has been dumped outside 56 Rutherglen Road for a couple of months, it has now had the number plate’s removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rutherglen Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping., 6th March
item.description:
This is a daily occurrence. We are sick of it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Merrow Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Cow Lane foot path, 6th March
item.description:
Hello, on the green lawns on either side of the cow lane footpath leading to the Redriff Primary School gate entrance: litter accumulates everyday. I see that it is not picked up on either a daily or weekly basis. I have asked the school whether it is Council property or school, the school said it is council land. Two weeks ago i took my two children out on a Saturday morning to litter pick here and also in the tall shrubs the the left of the school gate. Please, may this cow lane path be added to the daily litter pick up routine? I have watched the new litter accumulating over the past two weeks. I can take my children to litter pick there again, but I wouldnt know how to explain to them why the coucil doesnt include that area in its clean up routine.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip from out of Woods, 6th March
item.description:
Little pick a team do an area items too large for us

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Amherst Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smash car window on pavement and grass, 6th March
item.description:
A car window was left on the pavement/edge of the shared grass in Acton estate/livermere road. It has now been smashed and remains on the grass and pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Livermere Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Sainsbury's large shopping trolleys in the road, 6th March
item.description:
Either stolen or abandoned and are rolling around and could hit cars etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forde Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees pruning and removal, 6th March
item.description:
The trees on asylum road ore huge and very mature. They haven't been pruned for years and I fear branches will fall on us when heatwaves hit again in summer. This is very dangerous as the branches are so heavy they could kill someone.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Asylum Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon and food waste on grass, 6th March
item.description:
Food has been scattered on the grass (neighbours are feeding pigeons) and there is a dead pigeon in the middle of the path on the shared grass in Acton estate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Livermere Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)
